Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Short exact sequences *)
(** ** Contents
- Definitions
 - ShortShortExact sequences
 - Remark on monics, epis, kernels, and cokernels
 - LeftShortExact sequences
 - RightShortExact sequences
 - ShortExact sequences
- Opposite category and (short/left/right)exacts
- A criteria for ShortShortExact
 - Cokernel from ShortShortExact
 - isCoequalizer to ShortShortExact
- Correspondence between ShortExact and ShortShortExact
 - ShortExact from ShortShortExact
 - ShortShortExact criteria
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Opp.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Morphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoriesWithBinOps.

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ + _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "- _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ - _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PreAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Additive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Abelian.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.AbelianToAdditive.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Kernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Cokernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinDirectSums.

Local Open Scope cat.


(** * Introduction
  Short exact sequences consist of three objects and two morphisms such that the first morphism is a
  monic, the second morphism is an epi, and an image of the first morphism gives a kernel of the
  second morphism. These sequences are classically denoted by a diagram
                           0 -> A -> B -> C -> 0
  We call such diagrams [ShortExact].

  To define short exact sequences we first define short short exact sequences, [ShortShortExact],
  left short exact sequences, [LeftShortExact], and right short exact sequences, [RightShortExact].
  These correspond to the diagrams
          A -> B -> C,  0 -> A -> B -> C,  and,  A -> B -> C -> 0,
  respectively.

  The definition of [ShortShortExact] says that the image of A -> B is the kernel of B -> C. This is
  equivalent to saying that the coimage of B -> C is the cokernel of A -> B. We prove this
  correspondence in the Section [shortshortexact_coequalizer].

    Next, in the section [shortexact_correspondence] we prove a correspondence between
  [ShortShortExact] and [ShortExact] by using the factorization formula for morphisms in abelian
  precategories. We construct [ShortExact] from [ShortShortExact] and we give a criteria to
  construct [ShortShortExact] from properties similar to [ShortExact]. *)

(** * Definition of short exact sequences *)
Section def_shortexactseqs.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.
  Let hs : has_homsets A := homset_property A.

  (** Image of the first morphism and equality of morphisms associated to it. *)
  Definition Image (SSED : ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)) :
    Kernel (to_Zero A) (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))) := Image (Mor1 SSED).

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) z

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) z

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
KernelArrow
  (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) z

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization1 f: f =
factorization1_epi A f
· factorization1_monic A f
KernelArrow
  (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) z

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization1 f: f =
factorization1_epi A f
· make_Monic A (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
    (KernelArrowisMonic (to_Zero A)
       (Abelian.Image f))
KernelArrow
  (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) z
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization1 f: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
KernelArrow
  (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) z

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization1 f: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) · g) =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
    (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
       (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) z

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization1 f: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· (KernelArrow
     (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) · g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization1 f: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow
    (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
       (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization1 f: f =
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow
    (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
       (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
CokernelArrow (CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow
    (to_Kernels A y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
       (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))) · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

    exact H.
  Qed.

  Definition isExact {x y z : ob A} (f : x --> y) (g : y --> z)
             (H : f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) _ _) : UU :=
    isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g (isExact_Eq f g H).

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
KernelArrow (Image SSED) · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) (Ob3 SSED)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
KernelArrow (Image SSED) · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) (Ob3 SSED)

    exact (isExact_Eq (Mor1 SSED) (Mor2 SSED) (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)).
  Defined.

  (** Coimage of the second morphism and equality of morphisms associated to it. *)
  Definition CoImage (SSED : ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)) :
    Cokernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSED))) := CoImage (Mor2 SSED).

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Abelian.CoImage g)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Abelian.CoImage g)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
f
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization2 g: g =
factorization2_epi A g
· factorization2_monic A g
f
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization2 g: g =
make_Epi A (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A)
     (Abelian.CoImage g))
· factorization2_monic A g
f
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization2 g: g =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
f
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization2 g: g =
CokernelArrow
  (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
f
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization2 g: g =
CokernelArrow
  (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
f
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
  (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization2 g: g =
CokernelArrow
  (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
f
· CokernelArrow
    (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact:= factorization2 g: g =
CokernelArrow
  (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
f
· (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
        (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
   · (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact: f · g =
f
· (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
        (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
   · (CoIm_to_Im g
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)))
f
· (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
        (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
   · (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
fact: f · g =
f
· (CokernelArrow
     (to_Cokernels A (Abelian.Kernel g) y
        (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g)))
   · (CoIm_to_Im g
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)))
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
 exact H.
  Qed.

  Definition isExact' {x y z : ob A} (f : x --> y) (g : y --> z)
             (H : f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) _ _) : UU :=
    isCokernel (to_Zero A) f (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) (isExact'_Eq f g H).

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
Mor1 SSED · CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSED) (CoImage SSED)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
Mor1 SSED · CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSED) (CoImage SSED)

    exact (isExact'_Eq (Mor1 SSED) (Mor2 SSED) (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)).
  Defined.


  (** ** Transform isExact to isExact' and isExact' to isExact *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H': f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact f g H'
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H': f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact f g H'
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H': f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H')
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H': f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H')
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H') iE: Kernel (to_Zero A) g
KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H': f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H')
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H') iE: Kernel (to_Zero A) g
i:= iso_from_Kernel_to_Kernel (to_Zero A) K
  (Abelian.Kernel g): z_iso K (Abelian.Kernel g)
KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H': f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H')
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H') iE: Kernel (to_Zero A) g
i:= iso_from_Kernel_to_Kernel (to_Zero A) K
  (Abelian.Kernel g): z_iso K (Abelian.Kernel g)
i · (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h) =
i · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H': f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H')
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H') iE: Kernel (to_Zero A) g
i:= iso_from_Kernel_to_Kernel (to_Zero A) K
  (Abelian.Kernel g): z_iso K (Abelian.Kernel g)
i · (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K w0
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H': f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H')
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H: f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H') iE: Kernel (to_Zero A) g
i:= iso_from_Kernel_to_Kernel (to_Zero A) K
  (Abelian.Kernel g): z_iso K (Abelian.Kernel g)
i · KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) K w0

  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g

f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w ⟧,
  CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · ψ = h

isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧,
    CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · t = h) y0)

 CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · t = h) y0
→ y0 = ?x

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H': f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0
 exact (isExact_to_isExact'_Eq iE w0 h H').
    (* Commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H': f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
(λ t : A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧,
 CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · t = h)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Abelian.CoImage g) w0 h
     (isExact_to_isExact'_Eq iE w0 h H'
      :
      KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
      ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0))
 apply CokernelCommutes.
    (* Equality on equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H': f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
∏ y0 : A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧,
    CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · t = h) y0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H': f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
y': A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧,
    CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · t = h) y')
 apply hs.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H': f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
∏ y0 : A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧,
 CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · t = h) y0
→ y0 =
  CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Abelian.CoImage g) w0 h
    (isExact_to_isExact'_Eq iE w0 h H'
     :
     KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
     ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H': f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
y': A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧
T: (λ t : A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧,
 CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · t = h) y'
y' =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Abelian.CoImage g) w0 h
  (isExact_to_isExact'_Eq iE w0 h H'
   :
   KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
   ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H': f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
y': A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧
T: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · y' = h
y' =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Abelian.CoImage g) w0 h
  (isExact_to_isExact'_Eq iE w0 h H'
   :
   KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel g) · h =
   ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel g) w0)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H': f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
y': A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧
T: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · y' = h
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · y' =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Abelian.CoImage g) w0 h
    (isExact_to_isExact'_Eq iE w0 h H')

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H': f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
y': A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧
T: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · y' = h
h =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Abelian.CoImage g) w0 h
    (isExact_to_isExact'_Eq iE w0 h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)) g
  (isExact_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ y, w0 ⟧
H': f · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x w0
y': A ⟦ Abelian.CoImage g, w0 ⟧
T: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) · y' = h
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Abelian.CoImage g) w0 h
    (isExact_to_isExact'_Eq iE w0 h H') = h

      apply CokernelCommutes.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact' f g H
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.Cokernel f)

x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

iE: isExact' f g H

h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.Cokernel f)

H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H) iE: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.Cokernel f)

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H) iE: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.Cokernel f)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
h
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f)
   · from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
       (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H) iE: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
h
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f)
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
       (CokernelArrow CK)
       (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) CK)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)

x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)

i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
h · CokernelArrow CK
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
 
A: AbelianPreCat

x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H) iE: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H) iE: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
tmp:= factorization2 g: g = factorization2_epi A g · factorization2_monic A g
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H) iE: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
tmp:= factorization2 g: g =
factorization2_epi A g
· make_Monic A (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
(factorization2_is_monic g)
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H) iE: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
tmp:= factorization2 g: g =
make_Epi A (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
(CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) (Abelian.CoImage g))
· make_Monic A (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
(factorization2_is_monic g)
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))

  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
tmp:= factorization2 g: g =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))

f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))

· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
   · (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H) iE: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
tmp:= factorization2 g: g =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
h · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H) iE: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
h · g =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H) iE: Cokernel (to_Zero A) f
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel f) CK
h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z

    exact H'.
  Qed.

iE: isExact' f g H

x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, y ⟧),
h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w z
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
  ψ · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h

h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z

ψ · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h

x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))

x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
 exact h.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.Cokernel f)
 exact (isExact'_to_isExact_Eq iE h H').
    (* Commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
(λ t : A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w0 h
     (isExact'_to_isExact_Eq iE h H'
      :
      h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
      ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.Cokernel f)))
 apply KernelCommutes.
    (* Equality on equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
∏ y0 : A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
y': A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y')
 apply hs.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
∏ y0 : A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y0
→ y0 =
  KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w0 h
    (isExact'_to_isExact_Eq iE h H'
     :
     h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
     ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.Cokernel f))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
y': A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧
T: (λ t : A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y'
y' =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w0 h
  (isExact'_to_isExact_Eq iE h H'
   :
   h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
   ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.Cokernel f))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
y': A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧
T: y' · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
y' =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w0 h
  (isExact'_to_isExact_Eq iE h H'
   :
   h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
   ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 (Abelian.Cokernel f))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
y': A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧
T: y' · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
y' · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w0 h
  (isExact'_to_isExact_Eq iE h H')
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
y': A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧
T: y' · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
h =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w0 h
  (isExact'_to_isExact_Eq iE h H')
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
  (isExact'_Eq f g H)
w0: A
h: A ⟦ w0, y ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w0 z
y': A ⟦ w0, Abelian.Image f ⟧
T: y' · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w0 h
  (isExact'_to_isExact_Eq iE h H')
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h

      apply KernelCommutes.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
isExact (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) f H

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
isExact (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) f H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (Abelian.Image
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x))) f
  (isExact_Eq (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) f
     H)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, x ⟧),
h · f = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w,
         Abelian.Image
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) ⟧,
  ψ
  · KernelArrow
      (Abelian.Image
         (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) = h

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =

y : A ⟦ w,
    Abelian.Image

isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w,
          Abelian.Image

    t

     y)

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y
∏
y0 : A ⟦ w,
     Abelian.Image
       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w,
       Abelian.Image
         (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) ⟧,
 t
 · KernelArrow
     (Abelian.Image
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) = h) y0
→ y0 = ?x

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y
A ⟦ w,
Abelian.Image (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) ⟧

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y
?h0
· CokernelArrow
    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x))

h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧

A ⟦ w, x ⟧
 exact h.

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A

    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) =

 apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y
(λ t : A ⟦ w,
       Abelian.Image
         (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) ⟧,
 t
 · KernelArrow
     (Abelian.Image
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) = h)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A)
     (Abelian.Image
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) w h
     (let H' :=
        internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ w, y ⟧)
          (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x · f)
          (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y)
          (λ p : A ⟦ w, y ⟧, h · f = p) H'
          (ZeroArrow_comp_left A (to_Zero A) w x y f)
        in
      let H'0 :=
        isM w h (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x) H' in
      internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ w, x ⟧) h
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x)
        (λ h : A ⟦ w, x ⟧,
         h
         · CokernelArrow
             (Abelian.Cokernel
                (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) =
         ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
           (Abelian.Cokernel
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)))
        (ZeroArrow_comp_left A (to_Zero A) w x
           (Abelian.Cokernel
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x))
           (CokernelArrow
              (Abelian.Cokernel
                 (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x))))
        H'0))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Image (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x))
  w h
  (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ w, x ⟧) h
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x)
     (λ h : A ⟦ w, x ⟧,
      h
      · CokernelArrow
          (Abelian.Cokernel
             (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) =
      ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
        (Abelian.Cokernel
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)))
     (ZeroArrow_comp_left A (to_Zero A) w x
        (Abelian.Cokernel
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x))
        (CokernelArrow
           (Abelian.Cokernel
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x))))
     (isM w h (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x · f)
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y)
           (λ p : A ⟦ w, y ⟧, h · f = p) H'
           (ZeroArrow_comp_left A (to_Zero A) w x y f))))
· KernelArrow
    (Abelian.Image
       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) = h
 use KernelCommutes.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isM: isMonic f
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y
∏
y : A ⟦ w,
    Abelian.Image
      (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w,
          Abelian.Image
            (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) ⟧,

f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

     y')
 apply hs.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

y0 : A ⟦ w,

 t

     internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ w, x ⟧) h
       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x)
       (λ h : A ⟦ w, x ⟧,
        h

               (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) =
        ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧

H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) y
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, x ⟧
H': h · f = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y
y': A ⟦ w,
Abelian.Image
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x) ⟧
X: y'
· KernelArrow
    (Abelian.Image
       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) = h
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Image (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x))
  w h
  (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ w, x ⟧) h
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x)
     (λ h : A ⟦ w, x ⟧,
      h
      · CokernelArrow
          (Abelian.Cokernel
             (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) =
      ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
        (Abelian.Cokernel
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)))
     (ZeroArrow_comp_left A (to_Zero A) w x

     (isM w h (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x)
        (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ w, y ⟧)
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w x · f)
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w y)
           (λ p : A ⟦ w, y ⟧, h · f = p) H'
           (ZeroArrow_comp_left A (to_Zero A) w x y f))))
· KernelArrow
    (Abelian.Image
       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) x)) = h
 use KernelCommutes.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
isExact f (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A)) H

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
isExact f (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A)) H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A))
  (isExact_Eq f (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A))
     H)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, y ⟧),
h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
  ψ · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat

x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, y ⟧),
h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
  ψ · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
ψ · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h

x, y: A

H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =

w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧

∏ y0 : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y0)

w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
∏ y0 : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y0 → y0 = ?x

 exact h.

w: A
