x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f)

          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Abelian.Cokernel f)

          apply idpath.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w h
     (internal_paths_rew (A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
        (h
         · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
             (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        (λ p : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
         h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
        (cancel_precomposition A w y
           (Abelian.Cokernel f)
           (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
              (Abelian.Cokernel f)) h
           (isE (Abelian.Cokernel f)
              (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                 (f
                  · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                  p =
                  f
                  · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                      (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                    (f
                     · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                         (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                       (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                    (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                     ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                       (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
                    (idpath
                       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                          (Abelian.Cokernel f)))
                    (ZeroArrow_comp_right A
                       (to_Zero A) x y
                       (Abelian.Cokernel f) f))
                 (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f)))))
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) w y
           (Abelian.Cokernel f) h)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w h
  (internal_paths_rew (A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
     (h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (λ p : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
      h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
     (cancel_precomposition A w y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        h
        (isE (Abelian.Cokernel f)
           (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
              (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
              (f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
               p =
               f
               · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                   (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                 (f
                  · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                      (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                  ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
                 (idpath
                    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                       (Abelian.Cokernel f)))
                 (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) x
                    y (Abelian.Cokernel f) f))
              (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f)))))
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) w y
        (Abelian.Cokernel f) h))
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
 use KernelCommutes.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
∏ y0 : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
y': A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y')
 apply hs.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
∏ y0 : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y0
→ y0 =
  KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w h
    (internal_paths_rew (A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
       (h
        · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
       (λ p : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
        h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
       (cancel_precomposition A w y
          (Abelian.Cokernel f)
          (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
          (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
             (Abelian.Cokernel f)) h
          (isE (Abelian.Cokernel f)
             (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
             (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                (Abelian.Cokernel f))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                (f
                 · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                   (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                 p =
                 f
                 · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                     (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                   (f
                    · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                        (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                   (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                      (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                   (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                    ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                      (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
                   (idpath
                      (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                         (Abelian.Cokernel f)))
                   (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A)
                      x y (Abelian.Cokernel f) f))
                (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
                   (Abelian.Cokernel f)))))
       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f))
       (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) w y
          (Abelian.Cokernel f) h))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
y': A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧
X: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y'
y' =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w h
  (internal_paths_rew (A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
     (h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (λ p : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
      h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
     (cancel_precomposition A w y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        h
        (isE (Abelian.Cokernel f)
           (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
              (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
              (f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
               p =
               f
               · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                   (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                 (f
                  · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                      (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                  ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
                 (idpath
                    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                       (Abelian.Cokernel f)))
                 (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) x
                    y (Abelian.Cokernel f) f))
              (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f)))))
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) w y
        (Abelian.Cokernel f) h))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
y': A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧
X: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h) y'
y' =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w h
  (internal_paths_rew (A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
     (h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (λ p : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
      h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
     (cancel_precomposition A w y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        h
        (isE (Abelian.Cokernel f)
           (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
              (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
              (f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
               p =
               f
               · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                   (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                 (f
                  · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                      (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                  ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
                 (idpath
                    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                       (Abelian.Cokernel f)))
                 (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) x
                    y (Abelian.Cokernel f) f))
              (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f)))))
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) w y
        (Abelian.Cokernel f) h))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
y': A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧
X: y' · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
y' =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w h
  (internal_paths_rew (A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
     (h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (λ p : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
      h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
     (cancel_precomposition A w y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        h
        (isE (Abelian.Cokernel f)
           (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
              (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
              (f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
               p =
               f
               · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                   (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                 (f
                  · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                      (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                  ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
                 (idpath
                    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                       (Abelian.Cokernel f)))
                 (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) x
                    y (Abelian.Cokernel f) f))
              (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f)))))
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) w y
        (Abelian.Cokernel f) h))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
y': A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧
X: y' · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
y' · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w h
  (internal_paths_rew (A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
     (h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (λ p : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
      h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
     (cancel_precomposition A w y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        h
        (isE (Abelian.Cokernel f)
           (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
              (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
              (f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
               p =
               f
               · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                   (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                 (f
                  · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                      (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                  ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
                 (idpath
                    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                       (Abelian.Cokernel f)))
                 (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) x
                    y (Abelian.Cokernel f) f))
              (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f)))))
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) w y
        (Abelian.Cokernel f) h))
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
y': A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧
X: y' · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
h =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w h
  (internal_paths_rew (A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
     (h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (λ p : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
      h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
     (cancel_precomposition A w y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        h
        (isE (Abelian.Cokernel f)
           (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
              (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
              (f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
               p =
               f
               · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                   (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                 (f
                  · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                      (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                  ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
                 (idpath
                    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                       (Abelian.Cokernel f)))
                 (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) x
                    y (Abelian.Cokernel f) f))
              (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f)))))
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) w y
        (Abelian.Cokernel f) h))
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
isE: isEpi f
H: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, y ⟧
H': h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (to_Zero A) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
y': A ⟦ w, Abelian.Image f ⟧
X: y' · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f) w h
  (internal_paths_rew (A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
     (h · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (λ p : A ⟦ w, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
      h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
     (cancel_precomposition A w y (Abelian.Cokernel f)
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y (Abelian.Cokernel f))
        h
        (isE (Abelian.Cokernel f)
           (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
              (Abelian.Cokernel f))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
              (f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
               p =
               f
               · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                   (Abelian.Cokernel f))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧)
                 (f
                  · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y
                      (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ x, Abelian.Cokernel f ⟧,
                  ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                    (Abelian.Cokernel f) = p)
                 (idpath
                    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x
                       (Abelian.Cokernel f)))
                 (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) x
                    y (Abelian.Cokernel f) f))
              (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A)
                 (Abelian.Cokernel f)))))
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f))
     (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) w y
        (Abelian.Cokernel f) h))
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
 use KernelCommutes.
  Qed.

  (** ** [Short Short Exact]
    [ShortShortData] such that the image of the first morphism is the kernel of the second morphism.
    Informally, an exact sequence
                               A -> B -> C
   *)

  Definition ShortShortExact : UU :=
    ∑ SSED : ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A),
             isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED)) (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED).

  Definition make_ShortShortExact (SSED : ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A))
             (H : isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED)) (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)) :
    ShortShortExact := tpair _ SSED H.

  (** Accessor functions *)
  Definition ShortShortExact_ShortShortExactData (SSE : ShortShortExact) :
    ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A) := pr1 SSE.
  Coercion ShortShortExact_ShortShortExactData : ShortShortExact >-> ShortShortExactData.

  Definition ShortShortExact_isKernel (SSE : ShortShortExact) :
    isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSE)) (Mor2 SSE) (Image_Eq SSE) := pr2 SSE.

  Definition ShortShortExact_Kernel (SSE : ShortShortExact) : Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSE) :=
    make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSE)) (Mor2 SSE) (Image_Eq SSE)
               (ShortShortExact_isKernel SSE).


  (** ** Remark
    In Abelian.v we have already shown that a morphism is a monic if and only if its kernel is
    zero, and dually is an epi if and only if its cokernel is zero. See the results
    - Abelian_MonicKernelZero_isEqualizer, Abelian_MonicKernelZero
    - Abelian_EpiCokernelZero_isCoequalizer, Abelian_EpiCokernelZero
    - Abelian_KernelZeroisMonic, Abelian_KernelZeroMonic
    - Abelian_CokernelZeroisEpi, Abelian_CokernelZeroEpi
   in CategoryTheory/Abelian.v. Thus, to define short exact sequeces, it suffices to assume that
   the first morphism is a monic and the second morphism is an epi. Similarly for left short exact
   and right short exact.
   *)


  (** ** [LeftShortExact]
    [ShortShortExact] such that the first morphism is a monic. Informally, an exact sequence
                            0 -> A -> B -> C
  *)

  Definition LeftShortExact : UU := ∑ SSE : ShortShortExact, isMonic (Mor1 SSE).

  Definition make_LeftShortExact (SSE : ShortShortExact) (isM : isMonic (Mor1 SSE)) :
    LeftShortExact := tpair _ SSE isM.

  (** Accessor functions *)
  Definition LeftShortExact_ShortShortExact (LSE : LeftShortExact) : ShortShortExact := pr1 LSE.
  Coercion LeftShortExact_ShortShortExact : LeftShortExact >-> ShortShortExact.

  Definition isMonic (LSE : LeftShortExact) : isMonic (Mor1 LSE) := pr2 LSE.


  (** ** [RightShortExact]
    [ShortShortExact] such that the second morphism is an epi. Informally, an exact sequece
                               A -> B -> C -> 0
   *)

  Definition RightShortExact : UU := ∑ SSE : ShortShortExact, isEpi (Mor2 SSE).

  Definition make_RightShortExact (SSE : ShortShortExact) (isE : isEpi (Mor2 SSE)) :
    RightShortExact := tpair _ SSE isE.

  (** Accessor functions *)
  Definition RightShortExact_ShortShortExact (RSE : RightShortExact) : ShortShortExact := pr1 RSE.
  Coercion RightShortExact_ShortShortExact : RightShortExact >-> ShortShortExact.

  Definition isEpi (RSE : RightShortExact) : isEpi (Mor2 RSE) := pr2 RSE.


  (** ** [ShortExact]
    [ShortShortExact] such that the first morphism is monic and the second morphism is an epi.
    Informally, an exact sequece
                            0 -> A -> B -> C -> 0
  *)

  Definition ShortExact : UU :=
    ∑ SSE : ShortShortExact, Monics.isMonic (Mor1 SSE) × Epis.isEpi (Mor2 SSE).

  Definition make_ShortExact (SSE : ShortShortExact) (isM : Monics.isMonic (Mor1 SSE))
             (isE : Epis.isEpi (Mor2 SSE)) : ShortExact := (SSE,,(isM,,isE)).

  (** [LeftShortExact] and [RightShortExact] from [ShortExact] *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
LeftShortExact

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
LeftShortExact

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
ShortShortExact
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
ShortShortExact
 exact (pr1 SE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 (pr1 SE))
 exact (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 SE)).
  Defined.
  Coercion ShortExact_LeftShortExact : ShortExact >-> LeftShortExact.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
RightShortExact

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
RightShortExact

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
ShortShortExact
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
ShortShortExact
 exact (pr1 SE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SE: ShortExact
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 (pr1 SE))
 exact (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 SE)).
  Defined.
  Coercion ShortExact_RightShortExact : ShortExact >-> RightShortExact.

End def_shortexactseqs.
Arguments Image [A] _.
Arguments Image_Eq [A] _.
Arguments CoImage [A] _.
Arguments CoImage_Eq [A] _.
Arguments make_ShortShortExact [A] _ _.
Arguments ShortShortExact_isKernel [A] _ _ _ _.
Arguments ShortShortExact_Kernel [A] _.
Arguments make_LeftShortExact [A] _ _.
Arguments isMonic [A] _ _ _ _ _.
Arguments make_RightShortExact [A] _ _ .
Arguments isEpi [A] _ _ _ _ _ .
Arguments make_ShortShortExact [A] _ _.


(** * [ShortShortExact] criteria
  In this section we show that for [ShortShortExact] a coimage of the second morphism is a cokernel
  of the first morphism and give a way to construct [ShortShortExact] from certain isCokernel. *)
Section shortshortexact_cokernel.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.
  Let hs : has_homsets A := homset_property A.


  (** ** [ShortShortExact] implies isCoequalizer.
    Note that in the definition of [ShortShortExact] we use isEqualizer to say that an image of the
    first morphism is a kernel of the second morphism. We show that also the coimage of the second
    morphism is a cokernel of the first morphism. Informally, this follows directly from the fact
    that the opposite category of an abelian category is an abelian category and that taking the
    opposite category twice, we get the same category. *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H: Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
KernelArrow (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE) · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE) w0

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H: Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
KernelArrow (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE) · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE) w0

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H: Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· (KernelArrow (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE) · h) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE)
    w0

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H: Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
tmp:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
factorization1_epi A (Mor1 SSE) · factorization1_monic A (Mor1 SSE)
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· (KernelArrow (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE) · h) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE)
    w0

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H: Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
tmp:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
make_Epi A
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE)) · CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE))
(factorization1_is_epi (Mor1 SSE)) · factorization1_monic A (Mor1 SSE)
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· (KernelArrow (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE) · h) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE)
    w0

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H: Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
tmp:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
make_Epi A
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE)) · CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE))
(factorization1_is_epi (Mor1 SSE))
· make_Monic A (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
(KernelArrowisMonic (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· (KernelArrow (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE) · h) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE)
    w0

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H: Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
tmp:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE)) · CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· (KernelArrow (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE) · h) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE)
    w0
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H: Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
tmp:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE)) · CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE) · h =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE)
    w0
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H: Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
tmp:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE)) · CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow
    (make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSE))
       (Mor2 SSE) (Image_Eq SSE)
       (ShortShortExact_isKernel SSE)) · h =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
    (make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSE))
       (Mor2 SSE) (Image_Eq SSE)
       (ShortShortExact_isKernel SSE)) w0

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H: Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
tmp:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE)) · CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE) · KernelArrow (Image SSE) · h =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Image SSE) w0

  (ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE)

h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧

    apply (ShortShortExact_isCokernel_eq1 SSE w0 h H).

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE)) (CoImage_Eq SSE)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE)) (CoImage_Eq SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w ⟧),
Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w ⟧,
  CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · ψ = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
∃! ψ : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · ψ = h

SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
(λ t : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
 CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · t = h) ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
∏ y : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
    CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · t = h) y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
∏ y : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
 CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · t = h) y → y = ?x

    (* Construction of the morphism *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧
 exact (CokernelOut
               (to_Zero A) (CoImage SSE) w0 h (ShortShortExact_isCokernel_eq2 SSE w0 h H')).
    (* Commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
(λ t : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
 CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · t = h)
  (CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage SSE) w0 h
     (ShortShortExact_isCokernel_eq2 SSE w0 h H'))
 apply CokernelCommutes.
    (* Equality on equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
∏ y : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
    CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · t = h) y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
y: A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
    CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · t = h) y)
 apply hs.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
∏ y : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
 CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · t = h) y
→ y =
  CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage SSE) w0 h
    (ShortShortExact_isCokernel_eq2 SSE w0 h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
y: A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧
T: (λ t : A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧,
 CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · t = h) y
y =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage SSE) w0 h
  (ShortShortExact_isCokernel_eq2 SSE w0 h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
y: A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧
T: CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · y = h
y =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage SSE) w0 h
  (ShortShortExact_isCokernel_eq2 SSE w0 h H')

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
y: A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧
T: CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · y = h
CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · y =
CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage SSE) w0 h
    (ShortShortExact_isCokernel_eq2 SSE w0 h H')

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
y: A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧
T: CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · y = h
h =
CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage SSE) w0 h
    (ShortShortExact_isCokernel_eq2 SSE w0 h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w0: A
h: A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, w0 ⟧
H': Mor1 SSE · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) w0
y: A ⟦ CoImage SSE, w0 ⟧
T: CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE) · y = h
CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CoImage SSE) w0 h
    (ShortShortExact_isCokernel_eq2 SSE w0 h H') = h

      apply CokernelCommutes.
  Qed.

  Definition ShortShortExact_Cokernel (SSE : ShortShortExact A) :
    Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) := make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSE))
                                               (CoImage_Eq SSE)
                                               (ShortShortExact_isCokernel SSE).


  (** ** From isCokernel to [ShortShortExact]
    We show that we can construct [ShortShortExact] from the isCokernel property proved above. *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
H': isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
H': isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))

hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =

  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
H': isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) 
  (Mor1 SSED) (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED) H': Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))

hs:= A: has_homsets A

w: A

  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) 
  (Mor1 SSED) (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED) H': Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel 
  (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
H': isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) 
  (Mor1 SSED) (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED) H': Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel 
  (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker
isM:= is_iso_Monic A i (pr2 i): Monic A (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
H': isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) 
  (Mor1 SSED) (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED) H': Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel 
  (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker
isM:= is_iso_Monic A i (pr2 i): Monic A (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))
· pr1 isM =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))
· pr1 isM
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
H': isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
coker:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) 
  (Mor1 SSED) (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED) H': Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
i:= iso_from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel 
  (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker: z_iso (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker
isM:= is_iso_Monic A i (pr2 i): Monic A (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))
· from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
    (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))
· from_Cokernel_to_Cokernel (to_Zero A)
    (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker

  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))

  (Mor1 SSED) (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))

· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A)
       (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) coker
       (CokernelArrow coker)
       (CokernelCompZero (to_Zero A) coker)) =

h
· CokernelArrow
    (make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)

factorization2_epi A (Mor2 SSED)
· factorization2_monic A (Mor2 SSED)

· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)

· factorization2_monic A (Mor2 SSED)

     (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)))
· make_Monic A
    (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
     · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
    (factorization2_is_monic (Mor2 SSED))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧),
h · Mor2 SSED = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
  ψ · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
ψ · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h

SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)

  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) 
  ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y → 
y = ?x

    (* Construction of the morphism *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
 apply (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
                      (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq1
                         SSED w h (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq2 SSED w h H' H) H)).
    (* Commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
     (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq1 SSED w h
        (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq2 SSED w h
           H' H) H))
 apply KernelCommutes.
    (* Equality on equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y)
 apply hs.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y
→ y =
  KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
    (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq1 SSED w h
       (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq2 SSED w h
          H' H) H)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y
y =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq1 SSED w h
     (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq2 SSED w h H'
        H) H)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h
y =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq1 SSED w h
     (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq2 SSED w h H'
        H) H)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h
y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq1 SSED w h
     (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq2 SSED w h H'
        H) H) · KernelArrow (Image SSED)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h
h =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq1 SSED w h
     (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq2 SSED w h H'
        H) H) · KernelArrow (Image SSED)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
  (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED)) 
  (CoImage_Eq SSED)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · Mor2 SSED =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSED)
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq1 SSED w h
     (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_eq2 SSED w h H'
        H) H) · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h

      apply KernelCommutes.
  Qed.

  Definition ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel (SSED : ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A))
             (H : isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) (CokernelArrow (CoImage SSED))
                             (CoImage_Eq SSED)) : ShortShortExact A :=
    make_ShortShortExact SSED (ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel_isKernel SSED H).

End shortshortexact_cokernel.
Arguments ShortShortExact_Cokernel [A] _ .
Arguments ShortShortExact_from_isCokernel [A] _ _.


(** * Correspondence of shortexact in A an A^op *)
Section shortexact_opp.

  Local Opaque ZeroArrow isKernel isCokernel.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
(g : Abelian_opp A ⟦ z, y ⟧)
· (f : Abelian_opp A ⟦ y, x ⟧) =
ZeroArrow (Zero_opp A (to_Zero A)) z x

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
(g : Abelian_opp A ⟦ z, y ⟧)
· (f : Abelian_opp A ⟦ y, x ⟧) =
ZeroArrow (Zero_opp A (to_Zero A)) z x

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
f · g = ZeroArrow (Zero_opp A (to_Zero A)) z x
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z =
ZeroArrow (Zero_opp A (to_Zero A)) z x
 use ZeroArrow_opp.
  Qed.

  Unset Kernel Term Sharing.
  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact A f g H
isExact (Abelian_opp A) g f (isExact_opp_Eq H)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact A f g H
isExact (Abelian_opp A) g f (isExact_opp_Eq H)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact A f g H
isKernel (to_Zero (Abelian_opp A))
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) f
  (isExact_Eq (Abelian_opp A) g f (isExact_opp_Eq H))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact A f g H
Zero (pr1 (pr1 A))
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact A f g H
f · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g) =
ZeroArrow ?Z x (Abelian.Image g)
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact A f g H
isCokernel ?Z f (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) ?H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact A f g H
Zero (pr1 (pr1 A))
 exact (to_Zero A).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact A f g H
f · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x (Abelian.Image g)
 exact (isExact'_Eq A f g H).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y, z: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
H: f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
iE: isExact A f g H
isCokernel (to_Zero A) f
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g))
  (isExact'_Eq A f g H)
 exact (isExact_to_isExact' A iE).
  Qed.
  Set Kernel Term Sharing.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
ShortShortExactData (Abelian_opp A)
  (to_Zero (Abelian_opp A))
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isKernel (to_Zero (Abelian_opp A))
  (KernelArrow (Image ?SSED)) (Mor2 ?SSED)
  (Image_Eq ?SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
ShortShortExactData (Abelian_opp A)
  (to_Zero (Abelian_opp A))
 exact (ShortShortExactData_opp SSE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isKernel (to_Zero (Abelian_opp A))
  (KernelArrow (Image (ShortShortExactData_opp SSE)))
  (Mor2 (ShortShortExactData_opp SSE))
  (Image_Eq (ShortShortExactData_opp SSE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isKernel (Zero_opp (pr1 (pr1 A)) (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 A))))
  (CokernelArrow
     (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 A))
        (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
           (Mor2 SSE)) (Ob2 SSE)
        (KernelArrow
           (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
              (Mor2 SSE))))) (Mor1 SSE)
  (Image_Eq (ShortShortExactData_opp SSE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Zero (pr1 (pr1 A))
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Mor1 SSE
· CokernelArrow
    (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 A))
       (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
          (Mor2 SSE)) (Ob2 SSE)
       (KernelArrow
          (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
             (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow ?Z (Ob1 SSE)
  (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 A))
     (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE) (Mor2 SSE))
     (Ob2 SSE)
     (KernelArrow
        (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
           (Mor2 SSE))))
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isCokernel ?Z (Mor1 SSE)
  (CokernelArrow
     (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 A))
        (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
           (Mor2 SSE)) (Ob2 SSE)
        (KernelArrow
           (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
              (Mor2 SSE))))) ?H

      
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Zero (pr1 (pr1 A))
 exact (to_Zero A).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Mor1 SSE
· CokernelArrow
    (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 A))
       (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
          (Mor2 SSE)) (Ob2 SSE)
       (KernelArrow
          (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
             (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 A))
     (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE) (Mor2 SSE))
     (Ob2 SSE)
     (KernelArrow
        (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
           (Mor2 SSE))))
 exact (CoImage_Eq SSE).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE)
  (CokernelArrow
     (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 A))
        (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
           (Mor2 SSE)) (Ob2 SSE)
        (KernelArrow
           (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A)) (Ob2 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)
              (Mor2 SSE))))) (CoImage_Eq SSE)
 exact (CokernelisCokernel (to_Zero A) (ShortShortExact_Cokernel SSE)).
  Defined.

  Unset Kernel Term Sharing.
  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Image (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE)))
  (Mor2 (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE))
  (Image_Eq (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Image (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE)))
  (Mor2 (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE))
  (Image_Eq (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Image (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE)))
  (Mor1 SSE) (Image_Eq (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Zero A^op
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Mor1 SSE
· KernelArrow (Image (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE)) =
ZeroArrow ?Z (Ob1 SSE)
  (Image (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE))
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
isCokernel ?Z (Mor1 SSE)
  (KernelArrow (Image (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE)))
  ?H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Zero A^op
 exact (Zero_opp A (to_Zero A)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Mor1 SSE
· KernelArrow (Image (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (Zero_opp A (to_Zero A)) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Image (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE))
 exact (CoImage_Eq SSE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
isCokernel (Zero_opp A (to_Zero A)) (Mor1 SSE)
  (KernelArrow (Image (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE)))
  (CoImage_Eq SSE)
 exact (@CokernelisCokernel
               (Abelian_opp A) (Zero_opp A (to_Zero A)) _ _ _
               (ShortShortExact_Cokernel SSE)).
  Qed.
  Set Kernel Term Sharing.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortShortExact A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image ?SSED))
  (Mor2 ?SSED) (Image_Eq ?SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
 exact (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Image (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE)))
  (Mor2 (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE))
  (Image_Eq (opp_ShortShortExactData SSE))
 exact (opp_ShortShortExact_isKernel SSE).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact A
RightShortExact (Abelian_opp A)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact A
RightShortExact (Abelian_opp A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact A
ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact A
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact A
ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
 exact (ShortShortExact_opp LSE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact A
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 (ShortShortExact_opp LSE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact A
Monics.isMonic (Mor2 (ShortShortExact_opp LSE))
 exact (isMonic LSE).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
RightShortExact A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
RightShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortShortExact A
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortShortExact A
 exact (opp_ShortShortExact LSE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 (opp_ShortShortExact LSE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
LSE: LeftShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Monics.isMonic (Mor2 (opp_ShortShortExact LSE))
 exact (isMonic LSE).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact A
LeftShortExact (Abelian_opp A)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact A
LeftShortExact (Abelian_opp A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact A
ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact A
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact A
ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
 exact (ShortShortExact_opp RSE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact A
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 (ShortShortExact_opp RSE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact A
Epis.isEpi (Mor1 (ShortShortExact_opp RSE))
 exact (isEpi RSE).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
LeftShortExact A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
LeftShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortShortExact A
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortShortExact A
 exact (opp_ShortShortExact RSE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 (opp_ShortShortExact RSE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
RSE: RightShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Epis.isEpi (Mor1 (opp_ShortShortExact RSE))
 exact (isEpi RSE).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact A
ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact A
ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact A
ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact A
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 ?SSE)
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact A
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact A
ShortShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
 exact (ShortShortExact_opp SE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact A
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 (ShortShortExact_opp SE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact A
Epis.isEpi (Mor1 (ShortShortExact_opp SE))
 exact (isEpi SE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact A
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 (ShortShortExact_opp SE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact A
Monics.isMonic (Mor2 (ShortShortExact_opp SE))
 exact (isMonic SE).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortExact A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortShortExact A
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 ?SSE)
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
ShortShortExact A
 exact (opp_ShortShortExact SE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 (opp_ShortShortExact SE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Epis.isEpi (Mor1 (opp_ShortShortExact SE))
 exact (isEpi SE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 (opp_ShortShortExact SE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SE: ShortExact (Abelian_opp A)
Monics.isMonic (Mor2 (opp_ShortShortExact SE))
 exact (isMonic SE).
  Defined.

End shortexact_opp.


(** * [LeftShortExact] and [RightShortExact] from a [ShortShortExact] with extra properties *)
Section shortshortexact_to_leftshortexact.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) (Mor2 SSE)
(ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
LeftShortExact A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) (Mor2 SSE)
(ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
LeftShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) (Mor2 SSE)
(ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
ShortShortExact A
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) (Mor2 SSE)
(ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) (Mor2 SSE)
(ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
ShortShortExact A
 exact SSE.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) (Mor2 SSE)
(ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 SSE)
 exact (KernelArrowisMonic _ (make_Kernel _ _ _ _ isK)).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) 
  (Mor2 SSE)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
RightShortExact A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) 
  (Mor2 SSE)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
RightShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) 
  (Mor2 SSE)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
ShortShortExact A
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) 
  (Mor2 SSE)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) 
  (Mor2 SSE)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
ShortShortExact A
 exact SSE.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isCK: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSE) 
  (Mor2 SSE)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE)
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 SSE)
 exact (CokernelArrowisEpi _ (make_Cokernel _ _ _ _ isCK)).
  Defined.

End shortshortexact_to_leftshortexact.


(** * Correspondence between [ShortShortExact] and [ShortExact]
  In this section we prove correspondence between [ShortShortExact] and
  [ShortExact]. *)
Section shortexact_correspondence.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.


  (** ** Construction of [ShortExact] from [ShortShortExact]
    By using the factorization property of morphisms in abelian categories, we show that we can
    construct a [ShortExact] from [ShortShortExact] in a canonical way. More precisely, such
    [ShortExact] is given by taking the first morphism to be the image of the first morphism of the
    [ShortShortExact] and the second morphism to be the coimage of the second morphism of the
    [ShortShortExact]. *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))

    (* Work on mor1 using factorization *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
   · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
    (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
    (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
fact:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
factorization1_epi A (Mor1 SSE)
· factorization1_monic A (Mor1 SSE)
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
    (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
fact:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
factorization1_epi A (Mor1 SSE)
· factorization1_monic A (Mor1 SSE)
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
fact:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
factorization1_epi A (Mor1 SSE)
· make_Monic A
    (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
    (KernelArrowisMonic (to_Zero A)
       (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
fact:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
fact:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSE): Mor1 SSE =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSE))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSE)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))
Mor1 SSE · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Mor1 SSE · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))

    (* Work on mor2 using factorization *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Mor1 SSE · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Mor1 SSE
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
fact:= factorization2 (Mor2 SSE): Mor2 SSE =
factorization2_epi A (Mor2 SSE)
· factorization2_monic A (Mor2 SSE)
Mor1 SSE
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
fact:= factorization2 (Mor2 SSE): Mor2 SSE =
make_Epi A
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)))
  (CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A)
     (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)))
· factorization2_monic A (Mor2 SSE)
Mor1 SSE
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
fact:= factorization2 (Mor2 SSE): Mor2 SSE =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))
Mor1 SSE
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
fact:= factorization2 (Mor2 SSE): Mor2 SSE =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))
Mor1 SSE · Mor2 SSE =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Mor1 SSE · Mor2 SSE =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE)
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Mor1 SSE · Mor2 SSE =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 SSE) (Ob3 SSE)

    (* Follows now from the Eq *)
    apply (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSE).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
let Im := Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE) in
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (KernelArrow Im)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel (KernelArrow Im))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
let Im := Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE) in
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (KernelArrow Im)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel (KernelArrow Im))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
h
· CokernelArrow
    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
h · Mor2 SSE = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
X: h · Mor2 SSE = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)
h
· CokernelArrow
    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))))

SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
h · Mor2 SSE = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)

SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
h
· (factorization2_epi A (Mor2 SSE)
   · factorization2_monic A (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
h
· (make_Epi A
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)))
     (CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A)
        (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)))
   · factorization2_monic A (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
h
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)

SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
tmp:= factorization2_monic A (Mor2 SSE): Monic A (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) (Ob3 SSE)
h
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)

w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧

H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· tmp =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) · tmp
h
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)

· factorization2_monic A (Mor2 SSE) =

  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
· factorization2_monic A (Mor2 SSE)

   · make_Monic A
       (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
        · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))
       (factorization2_is_monic (Mor2 SSE))) =

h
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)

SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h
· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))) =
