· (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
   · (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSE)
      · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)

      exact H'.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
X: h · Mor2 SSE = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)
h
· CokernelArrow
    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
X: h · Mor2 SSE = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)
comm1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X: KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) = h
h
· CokernelArrow
    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
X: h · Mor2 SSE = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)
comm1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X: KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) = h
ker:= ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSE)
h
· CokernelArrow
    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
X: h · Mor2 SSE = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)
comm1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X: KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) = h
ker:= ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSE)
tmp:= Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSE)
h
· CokernelArrow
    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
X: h · Mor2 SSE = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)
comm1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X: KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) = h
ker:= ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSE)
tmp:= Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSE)
tmp_eq:= KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) tmp: KernelArrow tmp · Mor2 SSE =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) tmp (Ob3 SSE)
h
· CokernelArrow
    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
X: h · Mor2 SSE = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)
comm1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X: KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) = h
ker:= ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSE)
tmp:= Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSE)
tmp_eq:= KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) tmp: KernelArrow tmp · Mor2 SSE =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) tmp (Ob3 SSE)
comm2:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker tmp
  (KernelArrow tmp) tmp_eq: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker tmp 
  (KernelArrow tmp) tmp_eq · 
KernelArrow ker = KernelArrow tmp
h
· CokernelArrow
    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))))

  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))

· KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) = h

  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE))
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))

KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE))

· CokernelArrow

  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))))

  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))

· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker

   · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))

  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))

tmp_eq:= KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) tmp: KernelArrow tmp · Mor2 SSE =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) tmp (Ob3 SSE)
comm1: KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
     (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE))
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
     tmp_eq · KernelArrow ker) = h
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE))
    (Abelian.Cokernel
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))) =

A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSE ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))
X: h · Mor2 SSE = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Ob3 SSE)
ker:= ShortShortExact_Kernel SSE: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSE)
tmp:= Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSE)
tmp_eq:= KernelCompZero (to_Zero A) tmp: KernelArrow tmp · Mor2 SSE =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) tmp (Ob3 SSE)
comm1: KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)) w h X
· (KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker
     (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE))
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
     tmp_eq · KernelArrow ker) = h
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w
  (Abelian.Cokernel
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
let Im := Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE) in
let CoIm := Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE) in
let MP :=
  make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
    (CokernelArrow CoIm) in
let SSED :=
  make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) MP
    (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE) in
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (CokernelArrow CoIm) (Image_Eq SSED)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
let Im := Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE) in
let CoIm := Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE) in
let MP :=
  make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
    (CokernelArrow CoIm) in
let SSED :=
  make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) MP
    (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE) in
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (CokernelArrow CoIm) (Image_Eq SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (CokernelArrow CoIm) (Image_Eq SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧),
h · CokernelArrow CoIm = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
  ψ · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h

SSE: ShortShortExact A

SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
ψ · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h

A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)

∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y)

h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y → 
y = ?x

SSE: ShortShortExact A

  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)

A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
     (ShortExact_ShortShortExact_isKernel_Eq SSE w h
        H'))
 apply KernelCommutes.
    (* Equality on equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y)
 apply homset_property.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y
→ y =
  KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
    (ShortExact_ShortShortExact_isKernel_Eq SSE w h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y
y =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortExact_ShortShortExact_isKernel_Eq SSE w h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h
y =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortExact_ShortShortExact_isKernel_Eq SSE w h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h
y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortExact_ShortShortExact_isKernel_Eq SSE w h H')
· KernelArrow (Image SSED)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h
h =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortExact_ShortShortExact_isKernel_Eq SSE w h H')
· KernelArrow (Image SSED)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Im:= Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE): Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSE)))
CoIm:= Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE): Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Kernel (Mor2 SSE)))
MP:= make_MorphismPair (KernelArrow Im)
  (CokernelArrow CoIm): MorphismPair A
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) MP
  (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow CoIm =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w CoIm
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortExact_ShortShortExact_isKernel_Eq SSE w h H')
· KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h

      apply KernelCommutes.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
ShortExact A

ShortExact A

ShortShortExact A

isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image ?SSED))
  (Mor2 ?SSED) (Image_Eq ?SSED)

Mor1 ?MP · Mor2 ?MP =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 ?MP) (Ob3 ?MP)

MorphismPair A

A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
A
 exact (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)).
          
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
A
 exact (Ob2 SSE).
          
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
A
 exact (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)).
          
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
A ⟦ Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE), Ob2 SSE ⟧
 exact (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE))).
          
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
A ⟦ Ob2 SSE, Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE) ⟧
 exact (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))).
        
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Mor1
  (make_MorphismPair
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))))
· Mor2
    (make_MorphismPair
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
       (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Ob1
     (make_MorphismPair
        (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)))))
  (Ob3
     (make_MorphismPair
        (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
        (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE)))))
 exact (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image
        (make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A)
           (make_MorphismPair
              (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
              (CokernelArrow
                 (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))))
           (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE))))
  (Mor2
     (make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A)
        (make_MorphismPair
           (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
           (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))))
        (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE)))
  (Image_Eq
     (make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A)
        (make_MorphismPair
           (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
           (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))))
        (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE)))
 exact (ShortExact_ShortShortExact_isKernel SSE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Monics.isMonic
  (Mor1
     (make_ShortShortExact
        (make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A)
           (make_MorphismPair
              (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
              (CokernelArrow
                 (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))))
           (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE))
        (ShortExact_ShortShortExact_isKernel SSE)))
 exact (KernelArrowisMonic (to_Zero A) _).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSE: ShortShortExact A
Epis.isEpi
  (Mor2
     (make_ShortShortExact
        (make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A)
           (make_MorphismPair
              (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSE)))
              (CokernelArrow
                 (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSE))))
           (ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact_eq SSE))
        (ShortExact_ShortShortExact_isKernel SSE)))
 exact (CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A) _).
  Defined.


  (** ** [ShortShortExact] from data of [ShortExact]
    We construct a [ShortShortExact] from data corresponding to [ShortExact]. For a more precise
    statement, see the comment above [ShortShortExact_from_isShortExact]. *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c

  
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp:= maponpaths
  (λ h : A ⟦ Abelian.Image f, Abelian.CoImage g ⟧,
   CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f)
   · CoIm_to_Im f · h) H: (λ h : A ⟦ Abelian.Image f, Abelian.CoImage g ⟧,
 CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f)
 · CoIm_to_Im f · h)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
   · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) =
(λ h : A ⟦ Abelian.Image f, Abelian.CoImage g ⟧,
 CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f)
 · CoIm_to_Im f · h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) 
     (Abelian.Image f) (Abelian.CoImage g))
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp:= maponpaths
  (λ h : A ⟦ Abelian.Image f, Abelian.CoImage g ⟧,
   CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f)
   · CoIm_to_Im f · h) H: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
   · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
    (Abelian.CoImage g)
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c
 
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
   · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a (Abelian.CoImage g)
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
   · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
· CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a (Abelian.CoImage g)
· CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
   · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
· CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a (Abelian.Image g)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a (Abelian.Image g)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c

    (* Work on f in tmp *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a (Abelian.Image g)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)
fact:= factorization2 f: f =
factorization2_epi A f
· factorization2_monic A f
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a (Abelian.Image g)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)
fact:= factorization2 f: f =
make_Epi A (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f))
  (CokernelArrowisEpi (to_Zero A)
     (Abelian.CoImage f))
· factorization2_monic A f
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c
 
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a (Abelian.Image g)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)
fact:= factorization2 f: f =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f)
· (CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp: CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f) · CoIm_to_Im f
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a (Abelian.Image g)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)
fact: f =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f)
· CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c
 
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
tmp: f · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a (Abelian.Image g)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)

CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage f)
· CoIm_to_Im f · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
f · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) a c

A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =

  (Abelian.CoImage g)

 exact tmp.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, b ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f)

a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =

  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, b ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c

      apply H'.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, b ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
X: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.CoImage g)
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, b ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
X: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.CoImage g)
comm1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w h X: KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w h X
· KernelArrow ker = h
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, b ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
X: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.CoImage g)
comm1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq)
  w h X: KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
     isEq) w h X
· KernelArrow
    (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
       (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
       (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
       isEq) = h
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, b ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
X: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.CoImage g)
comm1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq)
  w h X: KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
     isEq) w h X
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f)

a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, b ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
X: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.CoImage g)
comm1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq)
  w h X: KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
     isEq) w h X
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f) = h
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq) w h X
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f)

a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧

· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =

  (Abelian.CoImage g)

a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, b ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))

KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq) w h X
· (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
   · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel f)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, b ⟧
H': h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)
· (CoIm_to_Im g · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
ker:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq: Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g))
X: h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.CoImage g)
KernelIn (to_Zero A)
  (make_Kernel (to_Zero A)
     (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
     (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H isEq) w h X
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
    (Abelian.Cokernel f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel f)
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
let SSED :=
  make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A)
    (make_MorphismPair f g)
    (ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK) in
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED)) g
  (Image_Eq SSED)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
let SSED :=
  make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A)
    (make_MorphismPair f g)
    (ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK) in
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED)) g
  (Image_Eq SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED)) g
  (Image_Eq SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧),
h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
  ψ · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
ψ · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h

A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
  (ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) 
  ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
  (ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y)
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
  (ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y → 
y = ?x

    (* Construction of the arrow *)

A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData 
  (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
  (ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
?h0 · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
 exact h.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
h · CokernelArrow (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (Abelian.Cokernel (Mor1 SSED))
 exact (ShortShortExact_from_isShortExact_isKernel_eq f g H isK w h H').
    (* Comutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h)
  (KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
     (ShortShortExact_from_isShortExact_isKernel_eq f
        g H isK w h H'))
 apply KernelCommutes.
    (* Equality on equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
    t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y)
 apply homset_property.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
∏ y : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y
→ y =
  KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
    (ShortShortExact_from_isShortExact_isKernel_eq f g
       H isK w h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y
y =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortShortExact_from_isShortExact_isKernel_eq f g H
     isK w h H')
 
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y
y · KernelArrow (Image SSED) =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortShortExact_from_isShortExact_isKernel_eq f g H
     isK w h H') · KernelArrow (Image SSED)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y
h =
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortShortExact_from_isShortExact_isKernel_eq f g H
     isK w h H') · KernelArrow (Image SSED)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isK: isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
(CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
SSED:= make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A) (make_MorphismPair f g)
(ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isK): ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, Ob2 SSED ⟧
H': h · g = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w c
y: A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧
T: (λ t : A ⟦ w, Image SSED ⟧,
 t · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h) y
KernelIn (to_Zero A) (Image SSED) w h
  (ShortShortExact_from_isShortExact_isKernel_eq f g H
     isK w h H') · KernelArrow (Image SSED) = h

      apply KernelCommutes.
  Qed.

  (** To see how the assumptions correspond to [ShortExact] note that every kernel is a monic and
     every cokernel is an epi. Also, the assumption H says that an image of f is the kernel of a
     coimage of g. In abelian categories every monic is the kernel of its cokernel, and thus one
     can show that in isE the kernelarrow can be "replaced" by the kernelarrow of the image of the
     kernelarrow. Thus the assumptions are similar to assumptions of [ShortExact]. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
ShortShortExact A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
ShortShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image ?SSED))
  (Mor2 ?SSED) (Image_Eq ?SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
MorphismPair A
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
Mor1 ?MP · Mor2 ?MP =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 ?MP) (Ob3 ?MP)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
MorphismPair A
 
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A

g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
A

A

· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =

  (Abelian.CoImage g)

A

a, b, c: A

g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧

· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)

A ⟦ ?a, ?b ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
A ⟦ ?b, ?c ⟧

        
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
A
 exact a.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =

  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
A
 exact b.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
A
 exact c.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
A ⟦ a, b ⟧
 exact f.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
A ⟦ b, c ⟧
 exact g.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
Mor1 (make_MorphismPair f g)
· Mor2 (make_MorphismPair f g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 (make_MorphismPair f g))
  (Ob3 (make_MorphismPair f g))
 exact (ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H isEq).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
a, b, c: A
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
H: KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f)
· CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Abelian.Image f)
  (Abelian.CoImage g)
isEq: isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image f))
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage g)) H
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image
        (make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A)
           (make_MorphismPair f g)
           (ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H
              isEq))))
  (Mor2
     (make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A)
        (make_MorphismPair f g)
        (ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H
           isEq)))
  (Image_Eq
     (make_ShortShortExactData (to_Zero A)
        (make_MorphismPair f g)
        (ShortShortExact_from_isSortExact_eq f g H
           isEq)))
 exact (ShortShortExact_from_isShortExact_isKernel f g H isEq).
  Defined.

End shortexact_correspondence.
Arguments ShortExact_from_ShortShortExact [A] _ .
Arguments ShortShortExact_from_isShortExact [A] _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .


(** * [ShortShortExact] from isKernel and isCokernel *)
(** ** Introduction
In this section we construct [ShortShortExact] from a pair of morphisms where the first morphism is
the kernel of the second morphisms and where the second morphism is the cokernel of the first
morphism.
 *)
Section shortshortexact_iskernel_iscokernel.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSED)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSED)
e1:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSED): Mor1 SSED =
factorization1_epi A (Mor1 SSED)
· factorization1_monic A (Mor1 SSED)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSED)
e1:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSED): Mor1 SSED =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSED))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSED)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSED))
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSED)
e1:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSED): Mor1 SSED =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSED))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSED)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSED))
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSED)))
  (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSED)
e1:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSED): Mor1 SSED =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSED))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSED)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSED))
is_z_isomorphism
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSED))
   · CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSED))
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor2 SSED)
e1:= factorization1 (Mor1 SSED): Mor1 SSED =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSED))
· CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSED)
· KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSED))
e: is_z_isomorphism
  (CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor1 SSED))
   · CoIm_to_Im (Mor1 SSED))
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor1 SSED)))
  (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isKernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
K:= make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)

A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) 
  (Mor1 SSED) (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
e1:= factorization2 (Mor2 SSED): Mor2 SSED =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
e: is_z_isomorphism
  (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
CokernelArrow CK
· z_iso_inv
    (make_z_iso
       (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
        · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor e) e)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)

  (Mor1 SSED) (Mor2 SSED)

e: is_z_isomorphism
  (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
e1: Mor2 SSED
· inv_from_z_iso
    (make_z_iso
       (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
        · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor e) e) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (make_z_iso
       (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
        · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor e) e)
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
CokernelArrow CK
· z_iso_inv
    (make_z_iso
       (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
        · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
       (is_z_isomorphism_mor e) e)

CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) 
  (Mor1 SSED) (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
e: is_z_isomorphism
  (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (make_z_iso
          (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
           · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
          (is_z_isomorphism_mor e) e))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) 
  (Mor1 SSED) (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
e: is_z_isomorphism
  (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
· (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor e)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) 
  (Mor1 SSED) (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
e: is_z_isomorphism
  (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
· identity (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
CK:= make_Cokernel (to_Zero A) 
  (Mor1 SSED) (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED) H: Cokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED)
e: is_z_isomorphism
  (CoIm_to_Im (Mor2 SSED)
   · KernelArrow (Abelian.Image (Mor2 SSED)))
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED)) =
CokernelArrow (Abelian.CoImage (Mor2 SSED))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
ShortShortExact A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
ShortShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image ?SSED))
  (Mor2 ?SSED) (Image_Eq ?SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
 exact SSED.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
SSED: ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
H: isCokernel (to_Zero A) (Mor1 SSED) 
  (Mor2 SSED)
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A) SSED)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image SSED))
  (Mor2 SSED) (Image_Eq SSED)
 exact (make_ShortShortExact_isCokernel_isKernel SSED H).
  Defined.

End shortshortexact_iskernel_iscokernel.


(** * [LeftShortExact] (resp. [RightShortExact]) construction for derived functors *)
(** ** Introduction
Let f : A --> B and g : A --> C be morphisms. In this section we construct a right short exact
sequence of the form
                     A --(f · i_1 - g · i_2)--> B ⊕ C --> W --> 0
where B ⊕ C --> W is the coequalizer of f · i_1 and g · i_2. Similarly for left short exact
sequences and equalizers.
 *)
Section left_right_shortexact_and_pullbacks_pushouts.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.

  Local Opaque Abelian.Equalizer.
  Local Opaque Abelian.Coequalizer.
  Local Opaque to_BinDirectSums.
  Local Opaque to_binop to_inv.

  (** ** [LeftShortExact] containing an equalizer *)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
MorphismPair A
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
Mor1 ?MP · Mor2 ?MP =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 ?MP) (Ob3 ?MP)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
MorphismPair A
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A

x1, x2, y: A

g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧

  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A ⟦ ?a, ?b ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A ⟦ ?b, ?c ⟧

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A
 exact E.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A
 exact DS.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A
 exact y.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A ⟦ E, DS ⟧
 exact (EqualizerArrow E).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A ⟦ DS, y ⟧
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
PA ⟦ DS, y ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
PA ⟦ DS, y ⟧

        
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
PA ⟦ DS, y ⟧
 exact (to_Pr1 DS · f).
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
PA ⟦ DS, y ⟧
 exact (@to_inv PA _ _ (to_Pr2 DS · g)).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
Mor1
  (make_MorphismPair (EqualizerArrow E)
     (to_binop DS y (π₁%abgrcat · f)
        (to_inv (π₂%abgrcat · g))))
· Mor2
    (make_MorphismPair (EqualizerArrow E)
       (to_binop DS y (π₁%abgrcat · f)
          (to_inv (π₂%abgrcat · g)))) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Ob1
     (make_MorphismPair (EqualizerArrow E)
        (to_binop DS y (π₁%abgrcat · f)
           (to_inv (π₂%abgrcat · g)))))
  (Ob3
     (make_MorphismPair (EqualizerArrow E)
        (to_binop DS y (π₁%abgrcat · f)
           (to_inv (π₂%abgrcat · g)))))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
EqualizerArrow E
· to_binop DS y (π₁%abgrcat · f)
    (to_inv (π₂%abgrcat · g)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) E y
 exact (AdditiveEqualizerToKernel_eq1 (AbelianToAdditive A) _ _ E).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
ShortShortExact A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
ShortShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
ShortShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
ShortShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
isKernel (to_Zero A) (KernelArrow (Image ?SSED))
  (Mor2 ?SSED) (Image_Eq ?SSED)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
ShortShortExactData A (to_Zero A)
 exact (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData f g).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image
        (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData
           f g)))
  (Mor2
     (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData f g))
  (Image_Eq
     (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData f g))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image
        (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData
           f g)))
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2) y
     (π₁%abgrcat · f) (to_inv (π₂%abgrcat · g)))
  (Image_Eq
     (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData f g))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image
        (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData
           f g)))
  (to_binop
     (to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2) y
     (π₁%abgrcat · f) (to_inv (π₂%abgrcat · g)))
  (Image_Eq
     (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData f g))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image
        (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData
           f g)))
  (to_binop DS y (π₁%abgrcat · f)
     (to_inv (π₂%abgrcat · g)))
  (Image_Eq
     (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData f g))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image
        (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData
           f g)))
  (to_binop DS y (π₁%abgrcat · f)
     (to_inv (π₂%abgrcat · g)))
  (Image_Eq
     (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData f g))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) x1 x2: BinDirectSum x1 x2
E:= Equalizer A (π₁%abgrcat · f) (π₂%abgrcat · g): Equalizers.Equalizer (π₁%abgrcat · f)
  (π₂%abgrcat · g)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (Mor1
     (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData f g))
  (Mor2
     (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData f g))
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A)
     (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExactData f g))

      exact (AdditiveEqualizerToKernel_isKernel (AbelianToAdditive A) _ _ E).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
LeftShortExact A

  
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
LeftShortExact A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
ShortShortExact A
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
Monics.isMonic (Mor1 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
ShortShortExact A
 exact (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExact f g).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x1, x2, y: A
f: A ⟦ x1, y ⟧
g: A ⟦ x2, y ⟧
Monics.isMonic
  (Mor1 (LeftShortExact_Equalizer_ShortShortExact f g))
 use EqualizerArrowisMonic.
  Defined.


  (** ** [RightShortExact] containing a coequalizer *)

MorphismPair A

Mor1 ?MP · Mor2 ?MP =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (Ob1 ?MP) (Ob3 ?MP)

  (g · ι₂%abgrcat)

PA ⟦ x, DS ⟧
 exact (f · to_In1 DS).
        
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y1, y2: A
f: A ⟦ x, y1 ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y2 ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) y1 y2: BinDirectSum y1 y2

  (g · ι₂%abgrcat)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
PA ⟦ x, DS ⟧
 exact (@to_inv PA _ _ (g · to_In2 DS)).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y1, y2: A
f: A ⟦ x, y1 ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y2 ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) y1 y2: BinDirectSum y1 y2
CE:= Coequalizer A (f · ι₁%abgrcat) (g · ι₂%abgrcat): Coequalizers.Coequalizer (f · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (g · ι₂%abgrcat)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
A ⟦ DS, CE ⟧
 exact (CoequalizerArrow CE).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y1, y2: A
f: A ⟦ x, y1 ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y2 ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) y1 y2: BinDirectSum y1 y2
CE:= Coequalizer A (f · ι₁%abgrcat) (g · ι₂%abgrcat): Coequalizers.Coequalizer (f · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (g · ι₂%abgrcat)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
Mor1
  (make_MorphismPair
     (to_binop x DS (f · ι₁%abgrcat)
        (to_inv (g · ι₂%abgrcat)))
     (CoequalizerArrow CE))
· Mor2
    (make_MorphismPair
       (to_binop x DS (f · ι₁%abgrcat)
          (to_inv (g · ι₂%abgrcat)))
       (CoequalizerArrow CE)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A)
  (Ob1
     (make_MorphismPair
        (to_binop x DS (f · ι₁%abgrcat)
           (to_inv (g · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (CoequalizerArrow CE)))
  (Ob3
     (make_MorphismPair
        (to_binop x DS (f · ι₁%abgrcat)
           (to_inv (g · ι₂%abgrcat)))
        (CoequalizerArrow CE)))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y1, y2: A
f: A ⟦ x, y1 ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y2 ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) y1 y2: BinDirectSum y1 y2
CE:= Coequalizer A (f · ι₁%abgrcat) (g · ι₂%abgrcat): Coequalizers.Coequalizer (f · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (g · ι₂%abgrcat)
PA:= AbelianToAdditive A : PreAdditive: PreAdditive
to_binop x DS (f · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (to_inv (g · ι₂%abgrcat)) · CoequalizerArrow CE =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x CE
 exact (AdditiveCoequalizerToCokernel_eq1 (AbelianToAdditive A) _ _ CE).
  Defined.

isKernel (to_Zero A)

     (Image

A: AbelianPreCat
x, y1, y2: A
f: A ⟦ x, y1 ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y2 ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) y1 y2: BinDirectSum y1 y2
CE:= Coequalizer A (f · ι₁%abgrcat) (g · ι₂%abgrcat): Coequalizers.Coequalizer (f · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (g · ι₂%abgrcat)
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow
     (Image
        (RightShortExact_Coequalizer_ShortShortExactData
           f g))) (CoequalizerArrow CE)
  (Image_Eq
     (RightShortExact_Coequalizer_ShortShortExactData
        f g))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y1, y2: A
f: A ⟦ x, y1 ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y2 ⟧
DS:= to_BinDirectSums (AbelianToAdditive A) y1 y2: BinDirectSum y1 y2
CE:= Coequalizer A (f · ι₁%abgrcat) (g · ι₂%abgrcat): Coequalizers.Coequalizer (f · ι₁%abgrcat)
  (g · ι₂%abgrcat)
isCokernel (to_Zero A)
  (Mor1
     (RightShortExact_Coequalizer_ShortShortExactData
        f g))
  (Mor2
     (RightShortExact_Coequalizer_ShortShortExactData
        f g))
  (ShortShortExactData_Eq (to_Zero A)
     (RightShortExact_Coequalizer_ShortShortExactData
        f g))

      exact (AdditiveCoequalizerToCokernel_isCokernel (AbelianToAdditive A) _ _ CE).
  Defined.

x, y1, y2: A
f: A ⟦ x, y1 ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y2 ⟧
Epis.isEpi (Mor2 ?SSE)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y1, y2: A
f: A ⟦ x, y1 ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y2 ⟧
ShortShortExact A
 exact (RightShortExact_Coequalizer_ShortShortExact f g).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
x, y1, y2: A
f: A ⟦ x, y1 ⟧
g: A ⟦ x, y2 ⟧
Epis.isEpi
  (Mor2
     (RightShortExact_Coequalizer_ShortShortExact f g))
 use CoequalizerArrowisEpi.
  Defined.

End left_right_shortexact_and_pullbacks_pushouts.
